text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I guess some Umamusume are just more gifted
than others.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Having natural talent and charm—that's just how
they're born. And it turns their whole life into a
spectacle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Those are the racers who become the stuff of
legends.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No one can surpass you if you become a legend...
But still!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna run as if this weren't Oguri's last race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: If I keep thinking about it like some big thing, I'll lose... And then the one everyone is rooting to win will win, simple as that.
choice_data_list: So the one who wasn't chosen is going to win?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. I'm in the right position to catch up to
Oguri, and I'll get my second Grand Prix crown
fair and square!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I think wrapping things up like that would give
everyone the most to hope for.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Even a legend can be surpassed with the right
effort. And there's no better time and place to
prove it than now!
choice_data_list: You got that right! Let's go!
You got that right! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'll run like I always do. My moves will depend on
what happens on the track. I'm staking it all on
instinct...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It is I who will succeed Oguri—in order to usher in
a new era belonging to the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I believe in the strength of this body that my
trainer and I have been working so hard on
sculpting together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the senior year Arima Kinen. The culmination
of all Mejiro Ryan's hard work is about to begin!
